channel.title: Bettzen - Premium Women's Wear Supplier on HUGO MyPortfolio Theme
channel.description: Recent content in Bettzen - Premium Women's Wear Supplier on HUGO MyPortfolio Theme

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Based in Shenzhen, the fashion capital of China, Shenzhen Baichen Garment Co., Ltd. (Bettzen) has more than 10 years of experience in design and production of high-end women’s wear. We have long been supplying top-quality garments to brand stores and agents across China. With mature patterns, stable quality control, fast re-order capacity and strong fashion sense, we have officially expanded our export business. Our products cover:

  • High-end women’s wear (dresses, blouses, knits, suits, windbreakers, coats, pants, skirts, sets)
  • Fashion shoes, hats, bags and accessories

We insist on:

item.title: Advantages
item.description:
Our Advantages｜Why Choose Bettzen As Your Supplier

1. 10+ Years Industry Experience & Mature System

Shenzhen Baichen Garment Co., Ltd. (Bettzen), a local high-end women’s wear manufacturer in Shenzhen, long-term service for brands and stores, with stable patterns, craftsmanship and quality.

2. Premium Positioning, Suitable for Global Markets

Bettzen’s styles are simple, elegant and versatile, suitable for Europe, America, Southeast Asia, Middle East and other markets.

3. Complete Supply Chain & Fast Response

One-stop from design, pattern, production, QC to shipping. Small orders acceptable, large orders stable, delivery controllable.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Welcome Global Buyers & Partners · Bettzen

Shenzhen Baichen Garment Co., Ltd.
Brand：Bettzen
Official Website：bettzen.com

Main Business: High-end women’s wear, shoes, hats, accessories | Stock wholesale | OEM/ODM customization

Address: Shenzhen, China
Business Contact: Export Manager
Phone/WhatsApp: ____________
WeChat: ____________
Email: ____________

Welcome factory visiting, video checking, online long-term cooperation!

item.title: Custom & OEM/ODM
item.description:
Custom & OEM/ODM

Custom design based on your drawings/samples, ODM original design, OEM private label production.

We provide full support for brands: from concept to finished product. Whether you have a specific design or need us to create something unique, we can bring your vision to life. Custom labels, tags, and packaging available.

item.title: Services
item.description:
Our Services｜Bettzen One-Stop Export Service

  • Style & Catalog Selection: Provide HD catalogs, online quick selection & ordering.
  • Custom Pattern & Sample Making: Fast pattern & sample confirmation based on your designs, pictures or samples.
  • OEM/ODM Brand Customization: Custom labels, tags, packaging to build your own brand. Bettzen supports you all the way.
  • Small Trial Orders Accepted: Welcome trial orders for new customers to reduce cooperation risk.
  • Export Packaging & Shipping: Standard export packaging, support logistics and customs clearance.
  • Long-Term Stable Supply: Ideal for brands, chain stores, offline shops and cross-border e-commerce. Bettzen is your premium supply chain partner.

item.title: Shoes, Hats & Accessories
item.description:
Shoes, Hats & Accessories

Fashion women’s shoes, bags, hats, scarves, jewelry and matching accessories.

Complete your look with our trendy and elegant accessories. We offer a variety of designs from classic to modern, all made with attention to detail and quality.

item.title: Women's Wear Collection
item.description:
Women’s Wear Collection

Dresses, blouses, knits, suits, windbreakers, coats, pants, skirts, sets and other premium fashion garments.

We offer a wide range of styles suitable for various occasions, using high-quality fabrics and exquisite craftsmanship. Whether you need casual wear, office wear, or evening dresses, we have the perfect designs for you.

Contact us for more details and catalog.
